subcodes.first_line: O Most Great Victory! God willing, mayest thou ever be, through the grace of the Sovereign of nations, joyous and mindful of His remembrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای فتح اعظم انشاء الله لم یزل و لایزال بعنایت مالک امم مسرور باشی و بذکرش ذاکر
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement
